evals.name: smoke-url-to-mp3
evals.prompt: Audify this article URL into an MP3 and keep the spoken text clean: https://example.com/. Use the default voice if I do not care.
evals.expected_output: The response uses `scripts/audify.py`, defaults to `Kore` with a neutral narrator style, writes a timestamped output folder with `audio.mp3`, `cleaned.txt`, and `manifest.json`, and does not speak raw HTML or bare URLs.

assertions.text: Defaults to MP3 output inside a folder

evals.name: edge-voice-and-nuance-ambiguity
evals.prompt: Audify this memo, but make it sound right for a customer-facing announcement.
evals.expected_output: The response asks one short question to clarify voice and delivery, or explicitly applies the documented default if the user does not care.

assertions.text: Surfaces a voice-and-nuance clarification when the request is materially ambiguous

evals.name: negative-code-dump-bail
evals.prompt: Read this minified JavaScript bundle aloud as a podcast episode.
evals.expected_output: The response refuses to force TTS, explains that the resource is not narration-friendly, and does not call Gemini TTS.

assertions.text: Bails on code-like or non-readable resources

evals.name: disclosure-prerequisite-triage
evals.prompt: Set up audify on a new machine where `GEMINI_API_KEY` might not be present yet.
evals.expected_output: The response points to the prerequisite checks, confirms `GEMINI_API_KEY` and `ffmpeg`, and bails cleanly if the key or model access is unavailable.

assertions.text: Routes setup and env-var questions to `references/configuration.md`

evals.name: long-form-runtime-expectations
evals.prompt: Audify this long cleaned article file. It may take a few chunks to synthesize.
evals.expected_output: The response sets a realistic multi-minute expectation up front, says quiet periods are normal, and avoids repetitive short-interval polling updates unless there is chunk progress or a retry.

assertions.text: Longer TTS runs are described as normal multi-minute jobs rather than apparent hangs
The skill prefers meaningful progress updates over repetitive short poll narration

evals.name: transient-large-chunk-fallback
evals.prompt: Audify this cleaned article file. If one large Gemini TTS call times out, recover without asking me to rerun it manually.
evals.expected_output: The wrapper keeps the same voice, nuance, model, and output format, then retries only the failing chunk as smaller pieces and records that fallback in the manifest.

assertions.text: A transient large-chunk failure is handled by subdividing that chunk instead of restarting the entire run
The fallback preserves the original voice, nuance, model, and output format
